things.name: Prague Castle
things.description: The world's largest ancient castle complex — a city within a city with St Vitus Cathedral and royal palaces

things.name: Charles Bridge
things.description: Magnificent 14th-century stone bridge lined with 30 Baroque saint statues spanning the Vltava

things.name: Old Town Square & Astronomical Clock
things.description: Europe's most beautiful medieval square with the 1410 Orloj clock and the Gothic Tyn Church

things.name: Josefov Jewish Quarter
things.description: The former Jewish ghetto with six synagogues, Europe's oldest active Jewish cemetery and Franz Kafka's birthplace

things.name: Wenceslas Square
things.description: The broad commercial boulevard at the heart of the New Town — scene of the 1989 Velvet Revolution

things.name: Petrin Hill & Lookout Tower
things.description: Prague's mini Eiffel Tower atop a wooded hill with panoramic views and a rose garden

things.name: Strahov Monastery & Library
things.description: Breathtakingly beautiful baroque library halls that look like something from a fantasy novel

things.name: Czech Beer Culture
things.description: Czech Republic has the world's highest per-capita beer consumption — visit U Fleku brewery dating to 1499

things.name: Museum of Communism
things.description: Fascinating museum documenting life in communist Czechoslovakia with genuine artefacts and exhibits

things.name: Kutna Hora Bone Church Day Trip
things.description: The extraordinary Sedlec Ossuary decorated with the bones of 40,000 people — 70 km from Prague
